subject: Project Management
title: WIP Limits
description: Learn WIP Limits in one minute.

hook.text: WIP limits cap how many items can be in progress at once. It's Kanban's secret weapon.

buildup.text: If the limit is three, the team can only work on three items. A fourth must wait.

discovery.text: Limits force focus. Instead of juggling ten things, the team finishes three and moves on.

twist.text: When a column hits its WIP limit, bottlenecks become visible. You can't ignore what you can see.

climax.text: WIP limits are uncomfortable. They expose problems. That's exactly why they work.

quiz.question: What do WIP limits do in a Kanban system?
options: Cap how many items can be in progress, forcing focus
Limit how many people can work
Set maximum working hours per day
